animals.name: Deshi Shahi Cow
animals.description: Healthy deshi cow suitable for Qurbani. Well fed with natural grass and hay. Very calm and easy to handle.

animals.name: Brahman Bull
animals.description: Big and strong Brahman bull, ideal for Qurbani. Raised on organic feed. Fully vaccinated and healthy.

animals.name: Shahiwal Cow
animals.description: Premium Shahiwal cow with excellent body structure. High meat yield. Suitable for both Qurbani and dairy.

animals.name: Australian Bull
animals.description: Imported Australian breed bull with massive body weight. Perfect for large Qurbani events. Vaccinated and certified.

animals.name: Deshi Kalo Goru
animals.description: Young and healthy black deshi cow. Raised in open field. Good meat quality and calm temperament.

animals.name: Rajshahi Fattened Cow
animals.description: Well-fattened Red Chittagong breed cow from Rajshahi. Natural diet, no hormones. Great for Qurbani.

animals.name: Deshi Khashi
animals.description: Healthy deshi khashi goat, well-fed and clean. Perfect size for Qurbani. Very active and healthy.

animals.name: Black Bengal Goat
animals.description: Premium Black Bengal goat with excellent meat quality. Famous breed of Bangladesh. Vaccinated and healthy.

animals.name: Jamnapari Goat
animals.description: Large Jamnapari breed goat with tall structure and good weight. Suitable for Qurbani. Well maintained.

animals.name: Boer Goat
animals.description: South African Boer breed goat known for high meat production. Heavy and healthy. Ideal for Qurbani.

animals.name: Deshi Pora Khashi
animals.description: Small and healthy deshi khashi goat. Good for budget-friendly Qurbani. Raised on natural grass.

animals.name: Barbari Goat
animals.description: Barbari breed goat with distinctive spotted coat. Medium weight and good health. Popular for Qurbani.

animals.name: Deshi Dumba
animals.description: Healthy deshi sheep suitable for Qurbani. Soft wool and tender meat. Raised on green pasture.

animals.name: Garole Sheep
animals.description: Garole breed sheep native to Bangladesh. Known for high fertility and good meat quality. Healthy and vaccinated.

animals.name: Merino Sheep
animals.description: Imported Merino breed sheep with heavy body weight. Premium quality meat. Fully vaccinated and certified.

animals.name: Deshi Fattened Camel
animals.description: Large Arabian camel ideal for group Qurbani. Imported and well-maintained. Suitable for up to 7 shares.

animals.name: Bactrian Camel
animals.description: Two-humped Bactrian camel with massive body weight. Excellent for 7-share Qurbani. Healthy and certified.

animals.name: Deshi Shur
animals.description: Strong and healthy deshi buffalo. Large body weight suitable for group Qurbani. Grass-fed and well-maintained.

animals.name: Murrah Buffalo
animals.description: Premium Murrah breed buffalo with excellent body mass. Known for high meat yield. Vaccinated and healthy.

animals.name: Nili-Ravi Buffalo
animals.description: Heavy Nili-Ravi breed buffalo suitable for group Qurbani. High meat production. Fully vaccinated and certified.

animals.name: Khari Goat
animals.description: Khari breed goat from Tangail district. Medium size with good meat quality. Active and healthy.

animals.name: Holstein Friesian Cow
animals.description: Large Holstein Friesian breed cow with high body weight. Excellent for Qurbani. Raised on quality feed.

animals.name: Toggenburg Goat
animals.description: Swiss Toggenburg breed goat with good body structure. Healthy and well-fed. Suitable for Qurbani.

animals.name: Deshi Mosha
animals.description: Large swamp buffalo raised in natural environment. Heavy body and good health. Suitable for group Qurbani.
